name: dev-squad
description: Full-stack dev team agent swarm with 11 specialized agents, zero-to-ship capability, and runtime workflow contract. Agents: coordinator (opus), architect (opus), designer (sonnet think_harder), backend (sonnet), frontend (sonnet), reviewer/security-lead (sonnet), qa-engineer (sonnet), auditor (sonnet), devops (sonnet), git-ops (sonnet), writer (sonnet). v4.9.0 adds: workflow JSON schema (.claude-plugin/workflows/) as canonical dispatch contract, companion plugin manifest with auto-install (/dev-squad bootstrap), UI-UX Pro Max integration in designer Phase 3.5, and GSD (get-shit-done) skills wired into 5 agents. Phase 3.5 DESIGN gate prevents AI-slop UI. Phase 5 review is 3-way parallel (static + runtime + automated tooling) with anti-AI-slop Visual Gate. Multi-language quality metrics (JS/TS, Go, Python).
